headline: 3 Steady Stocks with 3% Yields and Growing Profits

headline: Will ENB Gain From Rapid Expansion of Data Centers & Industrial Hubs?

headline: Enterprise Products Stock Undervalued: Is it a Strong Entry Point?
summary: EPD trades below peers on EV/EBITDA, backed by inflation-linked fees and $4.8B projects, yet lower yield and debt exposure argue patience.
